tasks.label: recycle-dnn
tasks.detail: Recycle IIS app pool so w3wp picks up the latest DLL+PDB
args: Start-Process -FilePath "$env:SystemRoot\System32\inetsrv\appcmd.exe" -ArgumentList 'recycle apppool dzp' -Verb RunAs -Wait; Write-Host 'Warming up site...'; $ok=$false; for($i=1;$i -le 6;$i++){ Start-Sleep 10; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://dzp.dnndev.me' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 | Out-Null; $ok=$true; break } catch { Write-Host "Attempt $i - not ready yet..." } }; if($ok){ Write-Host 'Site is up!' } else { Write-Host 'WARNING: site did not respond in time' }

tasks.label: build-and-recycle
tasks.detail: Build debug DLL then recycle IIS app pool
